title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kaido, Unknown person #7, Luffy, Tama as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How did she get so freakin' huge?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There's so many grunts out front!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll have to go through the IWato Chamber!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold up! I said cool it!! are you for real?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll repay straw hat by finishing you off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I've figured out how your attacks work!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At a glance it seems like your techniques strike randomly,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that's not true! They follow your line of sight, your target just needs to hear you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whatever, man!! I've got three numbers backing me up!! You're screwed anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why is one of the flying six here with an information?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Trying to win Drake over was a bust...!! Time to switch, gears!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have I got some news for you- let's RAP!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not now! And I've cut ties with Kaido,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So I'm not on your side!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FO' REAL?! Then you'll really wanna hear this-j)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My bad, Drake!! I've got to run off then!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oniga- Shima and the flower capital are at stake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Fuga! What the hell are you doin'?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it!! I can't miss this chance to get yamato on board!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
